tasks.title: Add CLI entry point with --version flag
tasks.notes: Implemented handleCliArgs() in src/cli.ts, reads version from package.json, exits with code 0. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Add help/--help command
tasks.notes: Implemented getHelpText() with single definition for DRY principle. Handles 'help' subcommand, --help and -h flags. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Add input validation for empty/blank string args
tasks.notes: Added validateStringArg() to validation.ts. Integrated into handleCliArgs(). Validates all positional args, skips flags. Exit code 1 on failure. All tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 1 — CLI Arg Parsing
tasks.notes: Build: SUCCESS (tsc compiled without errors). Tests: 33 PASSED (3 suites). Confirmed: --version prints v1.0.0 and exits 0; help/--help print usage and exit 0; empty/blank args fail with exit 1; server starts normally. No regressions in existing API tests.
